privacy_s1_p1: This Privacy Policy explains how {{appName}} ("we", "us", "our") collects, holds, uses and discloses personal information when you use our web application and progressive web app (the "Service"). We are committed to handling personal information in accordance with the Australian Privacy Principles (APPs) under the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth).
privacy_s1_p2: {{appName}} is a campus companion tool developed for students at {{uniName}}. This policy applies to all users of the Service.
privacy_s2_a_li3: Password (stored as a cryptographic hash — we never store your raw password)
privacy_s2_a_li4: Student ID, course, and year of study
privacy_s2_b_li1: TOTP enrolment secrets (time-based one-time password), stored encrypted and served with Cache-Control: no-store
privacy_s2_b_li2: WebAuthn/passkey credential IDs and public keys (no biometric data is stored)
privacy_s2_c_li1: Device type, browser, operating system, language preference
privacy_s2_c_li2: IP address (for security rate-limiting and abuse prevention)
privacy_s2_c_li4: Application error logs and performance diagnostics (collected via Sentry with all text masked and media blocked)
privacy_s2_d_li1: Units/courses, schedules, deadlines, reminders, and to-do items you create
privacy_s2_e_title: E) Location data (only with your permission)
privacy_s2_e_li1: GPS coordinates for campus map and navigation features — collected only when you grant browser/device location permission
privacy_s2_e_li2: Location data is processed locally on your device for real-time navigation and is not stored on our servers
privacy_s2_e_li3: You can revoke location permission at any time via your device or browser settings
privacy_s2_footer: We do not intentionally collect "sensitive information" as defined under the Privacy Act (e.g., health, racial/ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs) unless strictly necessary and with your explicit consent.
privacy_s3_li1: Directly from you — when you sign up, update your profile, create content, or adjust settings
privacy_s3_li2: Automatically — via session cookies, server logs, and error monitoring
privacy_s3_footer: In accordance with APP 5, we take reasonable steps to notify you at or before the point of collection (via in-product notices and this policy).
privacy_s4_title: 4. Why we collect and how we use personal information
privacy_s4_li1: Provide and operate the Service (authentication, core features, data sync)
privacy_s4_li2: Personalise your experience (preferences, saved settings, theme)
privacy_s4_li3: Maintain security (fraud prevention, abuse detection, rate limiting, incident response)
privacy_s4_li4: Improve performance and reliability (error tracking, diagnostics)
privacy_s4_li5: Communicate with you (service messages, important security updates)
privacy_s4_li6: Meet legal obligations and enforce our terms
privacy_s4_footer: We only collect information that is reasonably necessary for our functions and activities.
privacy_s5_p1: We may disclose personal information to:
privacy_s5_li1: Service providers who assist in operating the Service (see Section 6 for details)
privacy_s5_li2: Authorities if required by law, court order, or to prevent serious threats to life, health, or safety
privacy_s5_li3: Business transfers (e.g., acquisition or merger), with appropriate protections
privacy_s5_footer: We do not sell personal information.
privacy_s6_p1: Some service providers may store or process data outside Australia. Where we disclose personal information overseas, we take reasonable steps to ensure it is handled consistently with the APPs (e.g., contractual controls, security standards).
privacy_s7_p1: We take reasonable steps to protect personal information from misuse, interference and loss, and from unauthorised access, modification or disclosure. Our security measures include:
privacy_s7_li1: Encryption in transit (TLS/HTTPS enforced via HSTS)
privacy_s7_li2: Encryption at rest for database and file storage
privacy_s7_li3: Secure password hashing (passwords are never stored in plain text)
privacy_s7_li5: Role-based access controls and least-privilege service keys
privacy_s7_li6: Rate limiting and brute-force protection on authentication endpoints
privacy_s7_li7: Content Security Policy (CSP) with nonces to prevent XSS
privacy_s7_li8: Service worker security: API routes and authenticated pages are never cached; all caches are cleared on logout
privacy_s7_li9: Automated session expiry and secure cookie handling
privacy_s7_footer: No method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure. While we strive to protect your information, we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy_s8_p1: We retain personal information only as long as necessary to:
privacy_s8_li1: Provide the Service and maintain your account
privacy_s8_li3: Resolve disputes and enforce our terms
privacy_s8_footer: When your data is no longer required, we take reasonable steps to delete or de-identify it. You may request account deletion at any time via your account settings or by contacting us.
privacy_s9_p1: We use cookies and similar technologies to:
privacy_s9_li1: Keep you signed in and maintain secure sessions
privacy_s9_li2: Remember your preferences (theme, language, accessibility settings)
privacy_s9_li3: Monitor application errors and performance (via Sentry — with text masking and media blocking enabled for privacy)
privacy_s9_footer: We do not use third-party advertising cookies or behavioural tracking. You can control cookies via your browser settings.
privacy_s10_p1: Under APPs 12 and 13, you may request access to personal information we hold about you and request corrections if it is inaccurate, out-of-date, incomplete, irrelevant or misleading.
privacy_s10_p2_part1: You can view and update most of your information directly in
privacy_s10_p2_part3: . For other access or correction requests, contact us at
privacy_s10_p2_part4: . We may need to verify your identity before fulfilling requests.
privacy_s11_p1_part1: If you believe we have breached the Australian Privacy Principles, you may lodge a complaint by emailing
privacy_s11_p2_part1: We will acknowledge your complaint and respond within a reasonable timeframe (generally within 30 days). If you are not satisfied with our response, you may complain to the
privacy_s11_p2_link: Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC)
privacy_s12_p1_part1: Where the Privacy Act 1988 applies to us, if we experience an eligible data breach that is likely to result in serious harm, we will notify affected individuals and the OAIC as required under the
privacy_s13_p1: {{appName}} is designed for university students at {{uniName}}. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 16. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us and we will take steps to delete it.
privacy_s14_p1: We may update this policy from time to time. We will post the latest version within the Service and update the "Last updated" date above. Material changes will be communicated via in-app notification.
privacy_contact_p1: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our handling of personal information, contact us at:
mfaTotpPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
failedToSendCode: Failed to send code. Please try again.
tooManyFailedAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Please sign in again.
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
validation.termsRequired: You must agree to the terms and conditions
signupConfirmationSent: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}. Please click the link in the email to activate your account.
signupConfirmationHint: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or try signing up again.
setReminderDesc: Get notified before this item is due
sessionExpiredResetLink: Session expired. Please request a new reset link.
failedToUpdatePassword: Failed to update password. Please try again.
loginValidEmail: Please enter a valid university email
onboardingDesc: Tell us your course and year so we can personalise your experience.
mapLoadSlow: Map is taking longer than expected to load.
terms_s1_p1: By accessing or using {{appName}}, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the application.
terms_s2_p1: {{appName}} is a student productivity application designed to help {{uniName}} students manage their academic schedules, deadlines, and campus activities. The service is provided "as is" and we reserve the right to modify or discontinue features at any time.
terms_s3_p1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms_s4_li1: Use the service for any unlawful purpose
terms_s4_li2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the service
terms_s4_li3: Interfere with or disrupt the service or servers
terms_s4_li4: Share your account credentials with others
terms_s5_p1: The service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by {{appName}} and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
terms_s6_p1: Your use of {{appName}} is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your information.
terms_s7_p1: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. WE DO NOT WARRANT THAT THE SERVICE WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, SECURE, OR ERROR-FREE.
terms_s8_p1: IN NO EVENT SHALL {{appNameCaps}} BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE.
terms_s9_p1: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes by posting the new terms on this page. Your continued use of the service after such modifications constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms_s10_p1: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at
dragToMoveHint: Drag the marker or click on the map to move
installAppDesc: Add Syllabus Sync to your home screen for the best experience.
updateAvailableDesc: A new version of Syllabus Sync is ready.
syncConflictDesc: This item was modified while you were offline. Choose which version to keep.
loadingContentPleaseWait: A carregar conteúdo, por favor aguarde
eventsOverview: Visão geral dos eventos no campus
importantUpdates: Atualizações importantes e notícias da universidade
addSecurityKeyDesc: Give your new key a name to identify it later (e.g. "My Laptop" or "YubiKey").
removeSecurityKeyDesc: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}"? You won't be able to use this specific key to sign in anymore.
passkeySupportedError: Passkeys are not supported on this device.
passkeySigninDesc: Inicie sessão de forma segura utilizando a impressão digital, o reconhecimento facial ou uma chave de segurança do seu dispositivo.
announcementCalendarDesc: Click "Add to Calendar" on any event to save it to your personal calendar...
announcementCalendarFull: You can add any campus event to your personal calendar with just one click. This helps you stay organized and never miss important events. Simply click the "Add to Calendar" button on any event card to save it to Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or download an ICS file.
announcementEnrollmentDesc: Course enrolment for Semester 1, 2026 is now open. Check your...
announcementEnrollmentFull: Course enrolment for Semester 1, 2026 is now open. Check your enrolled units, add new courses, or modify your timetable through the student portal. Make sure to complete your enrolment before the deadline to secure your spot in popular classes.
announcementLibraryDesc: During exam period, the library will be open 24/7. Additional study...
announcementLibraryFull: During exam period, the library will be open 24/7. Additional study spaces have been made available on levels 2 and 3. Free coffee and snacks will be provided between 10pm and 6am to support your late-night study sessions. Security patrols have also been increased for your safety.
totalEventsDesc: Total number of upcoming campus events
thisWeekEventsDesc: Events happening in the next 7 days
freeFoodEventsDesc: Events with free food or refreshments
filterByCategoryDesc: Clique nas categorias abaixo para filtrar os eventos por tipo
totalEventsDetail: This shows the total number of upcoming campus events across all categories. Events include career fairs, social gatherings, academic workshops, and more.
thisWeekEventsDetail: Events happening in the next 7 days. Don't miss out on these upcoming opportunities to connect, learn, and have fun on campus!
freeFoodEventsDetail: Events featuring free food and refreshments! Perfect for students looking to grab a bite while networking or learning something new.
proTipCalendar: Add events to your calendar to get reminders
expectPizza: Pizza and snacks at club events
expectCoffee: Coffee and pastries at morning seminars
clickCategoryToFilter: Click a category to filter the event feed
filterInterestDesc: Filter events by category to find what interests you
youAreOfflineDesc: O Syllabus Sync requer uma ligação à Internet. Verifique a sua ligação e tente novamente.
errorProfileLoad: Não foi possível carregar as definições do seu perfil. Isto foi reportado à nossa equipa de engenharia.
passwordBreached: This password has been exposed in data breaches
passwordBreachCount: Found in {{count}} breaches. Please choose a different password.
